# stillbeat_check (Data Source)

Look up an existing check by its ID — e.g. to read the `ping_url` of a check managed elsewhere.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The check's UUID.

### Read-Only

- `channels` (Set of String) Alert channels.
- `flap_cooldown` (String) Flap-cooldown window (Go duration).
- `grace` (String) Grace period (Go duration).
- `max_run` (String) Run-too-long threshold (Go duration).
- `max_run_mode` (String) `hung` or `late`.
- `nag_interval` (String) Nag cadence while down (Go duration).
- `name` (String) Check name.
- `paused` (Boolean) Whether the check is paused.
- `ping_url` (String) The URL the job pings on success.
- `schedule` (Attributes) The check's schedule. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--schedule))
- `status` (String) Current status: `new`, `up`, `down`, or `paused`.

<a id="nestedatt--schedule"></a>
### Nested Schema for `schedule`

Read-Only:

- `cron_expr` (String) Cron expression, when kind is `cron`.
- `interval` (String) Interval (Go duration), when kind is `interval`.
- `kind` (String) `interval` or `cron`.
- `tz` (String) IANA timezone.
